name: New Yorker Pita Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/4-inch strips
1 can HEINZ Vegetarian Beans in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté chicken, onion, and green pepper in oil until the vegetables are tender-crisp and the chicken is cooked through.
2. Stir in beans, horseradish sauce, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 5 minutes to blend flavors.
3. Cut pitas in half and place a tomato slice and lettuce into each half.
4. Fill each pita with about 1/3 cup of the bean mixture.
Makes 4 servings (approximately 3 cups of mixture).
